title: ulmus glabra f. minor
intro: Ulmus glabra f. minor, also known as the dwarf elm or minor elm, is a subspecies of elm tree native to Europe. The bark and leaves of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which aid in the treatment of various health issues. The health benefits of Ulmus glabra f. minor include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
